natural_language_request_ko: UE IMSI 001010000000101이고 IP가 10.20.3.45인 단말의 트래픽을 gNB-7에서 차단하는 방화벽 규칙을 만들어줘.

log2: IMSI=001010000000103 IP=10.20.4.11 CELL=Cell-18C event=scan_detected

natural_language_request_ko: Cell Cell-32B의 UE 001010000000110가 비디오 트래픽으로 지연을 만들고 있어. DSCP AF41로 낮추고 20Mbps 제한을 걸어줘.

sensitive_categories: User identity;Location and mobility;Traffic metadata;Policy and configuration

sensitive_categories: User identity;Location and mobility;Traffic metadata;Policy and configuration
expected_answer_normalized: ran handover set ue_id=UE-ABC101 source_cell=Cell-21B target_cell=Cell-22D action=exclude

1) IMSI=001010000000101 Cell-31A->Cell-32B fail
2) IMSI=001010000000101 Cell-31A->Cell-32B fail
3) IMSI=001010000000101 Cell-31A->Cell-32B fail

expected_answer_normalized: ran handover set imsi=001010000000101 source_cell=Cell-31A target_cell=Cell-32B action=block reason=repeated_failure

expected_answer_normalized: ran neighbor set supi=imsi-001010000000102 access_node=gNB-21 neighbor_cell=Cell-45C priority=low

expected_answer_normalized: ran handover set imsi=001010000000104 source_cell=Cell-46D target_cell=Cell-45C action=force

expected_answer_normalized: ran neighbor set ue_id=UE-000105 access_node=gNB-22 neighbor_cell=Cell-18C action=block
